user.title: Connect to Bose CSP
user.description: Enter the IP address of your processor. The integration will attempt to auto-discover your zones and sources.

select_entities.title: Select Zones and Sources
select_entities.description: Select the zones and sources you want to enable in Home Assistant.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Auto-discovery failed or could not find any zones. Please enter the configured zones, sources, and default volume limits manually.

data.sources: Sources (comma-separated, e.g. Wireless Mic, Sonos, Aux)

error.discovery_failed: Auto-discovery failed. Make sure the Web Dashboard is closed in your browser. Enter your zones and sources as comma-separated lists below.
